lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਫਿਰੈ ਬਿਲਲਾਦੀ ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਖੁਆਈ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: manamukh bahut firai bilalaadee doojai bhaae khuaaee he |3|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh wanders everywhere, weeping and wailing; he is utterly ruined by the love of duality. ||3||
Uniting with Himself, He bestows glorious greatness.
By Guru's Grace, one comes to know the Lord's worth.
Egotism was instilled into the illusion of Maya.
The self-willed manmukh is deluded, and loses his honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨਾਮ ਰਤਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gur te giaan naam ratan paaeaa |
lines.english: Spiritual wisdom is obtained from the Guru, along with the jewel of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋ ਨਾਇ ਰਾਚੈ ਸਾਚੈ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai so naae raachai saachai rahiaa samaaee he |4|
lines.english: But one who becomes Gurmukh is absorbed in the Name; he remains immersed in the True Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਖੇਲ ਕਰੇ ਸਭਿ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਦੇਇ ਬੁਝਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: aape khel kare sabh karataa aape dee bujhaaee he |5|
lines.english: The Creator Himself stages all His plays; He Himself bestows understanding. ||5||
Desires are subdued, and one remains immersed in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਰਾਤਾ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਤੇ ਬਣਿ ਆਈ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: antar piaar bhagatee raataa sehaj mate ban aaee he |6|
lines.english: Deep within his inner being, he is imbued with loving devotion; intuitively, he becomes one with the Lord. ||6||
One who serves the True Guru eradicates self-conceit.
Meeting with his Beloved, he finds peace through the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਲਾਏ ਸੋਈ ਬੂਝੈ ਭਉ ਭਰਮੁ ਸਰੀਰਹੁ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: jis no laae soee boojhai bhau bharam sareerahu jaaee he |7|
lines.english: He alone understands, whom the Lord joins with Himself. Fear and doubt are taken away from his body. ||7||
The Great Giver, the Life of the world, Himself has met me.
The Destroyer of pain is known through the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਰਾ ਜਮੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਜੋਹਿ ਨ ਸਾਕੈ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਬਣਿ ਆਈ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jaraa jam tis johi na saakai saache siau ban aaee he |8|
lines.english: Old age and death cannot even touch one who is in harmony with the True Lord. ||8||
He Himself is the Gurmukh, and He Himself bestows His blessings.
Through the True Word of the Shabad, serve the True Guru.
The world is burning up in the fire of desire.
It burns and burns, and is destroyed in all its corruption.
Those who serve the True Guru are very fortunate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਪਾਏ ਕਬਹੂ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬੂਝ ਬੁਝਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: manamukh tthaur na paae kabahoo satigur boojh bujhaaee he |9|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh finds no place of rest anywhere. The True Guru has imparted this understanding. ||9||
True is the Word of the Shabad, and True is the Bani of His Word.
They remain lovingly focused on the True Name forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਵਿਆ ਨਿਹਕੇਵਲੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਬੁਝਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: antar naam raviaa nihakeval trisanaa sabad bujhaaee he |10|
lines.english: The Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord, permeates the nucleus of their inner being; through the Shabad, their desires are quenched. ||10||
How rare is that Gurmukh who realizes this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ਰਹਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad rate bairaagee aavan jaan rahaaee he |11|
lines.english: Those who are imbued with the True Shabad are detached. Their comings and goings in reincarnation are ended. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਅਪਣਾ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਹਉਮੈ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: satigur apanaa sad hee seveh haumai vichahu jaaee he |12|
lines.english: He serves his True Guru forever, and egotism is eradicated from within. ||12||
One who realizes the Shabad is cleansed of impurities.
The Immaculate Naam abides within his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਬੂਝੈ ਤਾ ਦਰੁ ਸੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur te boojhai taa dar soojhai |
lines.english: If one comes to understand, through the Guru, then he comes to know the Lord's Door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਸੇਵੇ ਕੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਭੂਖ ਗਵਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: satigur seve kee vaddiaaee trisanaa bhookh gavaaee he |13|
lines.english: The glory of serving the True Guru is that it eradicates hunger and thirst. ||13||
But without the Naam, one babbles and argues in vain.
Without spiritual wisdom, they understand nothing at all.
When the Lord unites them with Himself, then they come to understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੁ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jo dhur likhiaa su karam kamaaeaa |
lines.english: He acts according to his pre-ordained destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਦਾਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਮਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: gur kee daat sadaa man antar baanee sabad vajaaee he |14|
lines.english: One whose mind is filled with the Guru's gift forever - his inner being resounds with the Shabad, and the Word of the Guru's Bani. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਵਾਸਾ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: satasangat meh tin hee vaasaa jin kau dhur likh paaee he |15|
lines.english: They alone dwell in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, who have such pre-ordained destiny. ||15||
No one can erase the Command of the Primal Lord.
He alone finds the Lord, unto whom He grants His Grace.
He links his consciousness to the deep meditative state of the True Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸੁ ਕਹੈ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਭੀਖਿਆ ਨਾਮੁ ਦਰਿ ਪਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak daas kahai benantee bheekhiaa naam dar paaee he |16|1|
lines.english: Nanak, Your slave, offers this humble prayer; I stand at Your Door, begging for Your Name. ||16||1||
How rare is that person, who as Gurmukh, understands this.
Maaroo, Third Mehl:
The One and only Lord is pervading and permeating everywhere.
He created the 8.4 millions species of beings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eko rav rahiaa sabh antar tis bin avar na koee he |1|
lines.english: The One Lord is permeating and pervading, deep within the nucleus of all. Without Him, there is no other at all. ||1||
